content.content: Television presenter and model most well known as the face of Switch Cinema. She is also the director of the entertainment and modeling company IMAGEN Escuela Integral. Before beginning her presenting career, she studied at Politécnico Grancolombiano. She has a self-titled YouTube channel where she has posted several informational vlogs. She was born and raised in Bogota, Colombia. Both she andAdriana Vargasare popular television personalities from Colombia.
